reply_points: interested in the senior field technician role
based in Decatur and open to Atlanta-area work
ask for pay range and typical travel expectations
available for a call Tuesday or Wednesday afternoon

attributes.subject: Senior Field Technician opportunity in Atlanta
attributes.body: Hi Cassandra, I came across your AV installation background and wanted to reach out about a Senior Field Technician opening with a commercial systems integrator in the Atlanta area. The role includes leading installs, troubleshooting networked AV systems, and coordinating small crews. If you're open to hearing more, I'd love to set up a quick call this week.

attributes.subject: Backorder update for ceiling mount kit
attributes.body: Your ceiling mount kit is expected to ship next Tuesday. We'll send tracking as soon as it leaves the warehouse.

attributes.subject: Sunday service input list
attributes.body: Can you confirm whether we're keeping the handheld wireless on channel B for this Sunday and if the projector confidence feed is set?

attributes.subject: Re: Updated install photos
attributes.body: Thanks — attaching the final rack and display photos from today's classroom install.
